title: Klangkosmos
description: 20 years of scrobbles as a 3D planetary system. Sun = music, Earth = me. Top artists orbit as planets covered with their album art; top tracks become moons; phase artists are asteroids on elliptical paths.
license_notes: Three.js (MIT, https://github.com/mrdoob/three.js/blob/dev/LICENSE) loaded from unpkg CDN. Album covers fetched once at build time from the Cover Art Archive (https://coverartarchive.org, CC0 metadata; cover artwork remains copyright of the respective rights holders — used here as small thumbnails for personal data visualisation, a common non-commercial-fair-use scenario). Artist/release metadata via MusicBrainz (https://musicbrainz.org, CC0). Listening data from personal Last.fm scrobbles (2005–2026, https://last.fm), enriched with MusicBrainz metadata in day-002 — only aggregated top-artist/loyalty/top-track summaries are redistributed here. No external fonts.
